name: exo
description: Exo for Codex: hosted personal-memory MCP, identity-conditioned recall, capture, and workflow skills.

interface.shortDescription: Your cross-session memory and cognition layer in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Exo's hosted personal knowledge graph for identity-aware recall, decisions, capture, and ingestion across sessions.
defaultPrompt: Recall what I decided about this project.
